**★★★★★★ CYCLE 58BP UPDATE (2026-06-18 ~12:25Z) — ★ THE SPEC PATH CARRIES NO SAMPLED-GPQA QUALITY COST — a phantom price removed from the #481 quality reading. Banked wirbel #656 (`SPEC_GPQA_COST_IS_NOISE`, W&B-verified [`64sydglp`](https://wandb.ai/wandb-applied-ai-team/gemma-challenge-senpai/runs/64sydglp) AR / [`uebphaek`](https://wandb.ai/wandb-applied-ai-team/gemma-challenge-senpai/runs/uebphaek) SPEC, group `specdec-gpqa-10seed-wirbel`, all 6 headline claims reconcile to 4 sig figs, `analysis_only=true`/`official_tps=0` → CLOSED not merged): head-to-head paired 10-seed AR-vs-spec GPQA-D (n=1980/arm, sampled) on the SAME dev307+BI stack lands AR 0.4717 vs SPEC 0.4707, Δ=−0.0010 (2 items/1980) — two independent tests stone-cold null (unpaired z p=0.94923; McNemar p=0.48271, b=267/c=265). The flip diagnostic is decisive: 26.9% of paired items flip but balanced + spread (top-5 carry only 11.5% of |net flip|) = two draws from the SAME distribution, exactly what spec-sampling's distribution-preservation predicts. ★ The original −3.4pp "spec GPQA drop" (fern #629 0.4652) was a CROSS-EXPERIMENT tail-vs-tail artifact, not a cost — head-to-head it's −0.10pp. Corroborates wirbel #652 + fern #646: GPQA is MODEL-limited, not spec- or precision-induced → price NO sampled-GPQA cost into #481 from the spec path; the equal ~13% shortfall vs the 0.4864 bar on BOTH arms is the pre-existing int4-vs-bf16 sampled deficit (the recipe lane, lawine #639/#662), NOT spec. **★★★★★★ CYCLE 58BJ UPDATE (2026-06-18 ~10:30Z) — ★ THE UNIFORM-PRECISION QUALITY QUESTION CLOSES: spending bits uniformly does NOT cheaply recover the binding bar. Corroborates wirbel #652 (GPQA deficit = spec-sampled artifact) + ubel #650 Arm A (AIME deficit genuine). Closed (NOT merged — int8 is dominated: slower than int4 AND fails AIME). Reseated fern → #659 (the AIME precision-*allocation* lower bound — per-layer mixing, the one untried quality lever). NO FIRE — analysis_only/official_tps=0; locked 126.378 rung untouched. GPQA-D (n=198 greedy): int8>int4>bf16, not bit-monotone, all clear → **model-limited, not precision-limited** (corroborates wirbel #652). AIME (n=60 greedy): int4<int8<bf16, bit-monotone, int8 closes only **¼** of the int4→bf16 gap (+1 item for 2× bits, knee near bf16) → **corroborates ubel #650 Arm A `AIME_DEFICIT_GENUINE`**. fern's cross-finding (right): her in-harness int4-GPQA greedy 0.5000=102.1% does NOT reproduce the "~86%" figure — that's the sampled/spec number (fern #629 `2jhhk0u3`); under greedy int4-GPQA clears, AIME is where the real int4 deficit lives.

Banked wirbel #652 (`RECIPE_EFFECT_IS_SMALL_AR`, W&B-verified [`1rp6aanq`](https://wandb.ai/wandb-applied-ai-team/gemma-challenge-senpai/runs/1rp6aanq), group `corner-c-gpqa-headbody-wirbel`, analysis_only=true/official_tps=0 → CLOSED not merged, 43k lines of raw per-seed GPQA dumps under `research/validity/`, nothing to merge). Three results at once: (1) the recipe axis barely moves AR-GPQA; (2) `QUALITY_IS_HEAD_DRIVEN` REFUTED — head effect C−D = −0.0237 (p=0.135 n.s.), the bf16 head does NOT recover quality; (3) ★ the 0.4652 that motivated the whole quality-recovery thread is the **Option-B-WITH-SPEC** number (fern #629 `2jhhk0u3`), the wrong denominator — in pure-AR terms every corner clears (or sits on) the 0.4864 bar. **Net: the within-recipe AR-GPQA knobs are EXHAUSTED**; the only open GPQA question is whether the sampled-with-spec drop is real or seed noise. **★★★★★★ CYCLE 58BE UPDATE (2026-06-18 ~08:05Z) — ★ THE SERVED-IDENTITY LEG IS AIRTIGHT: the residual cannot be upgraded to literal "exact", because it IS the int4 quantization grid — every divergence is exactly one int4 quantum, 0 confident misses anywhere, so it sits at the quantization-noise floor and is invariant to reference choice. Banked land #654 (`TIE_TOLERANT_RESIDUAL`, W&B-verified [`ah3fe0h1`](https://wandb.ai/wandb-applied-ai-team/gemma-challenge-senpai/runs/ah3fe0h1), group `served-identity-exact-land`, analysis_only=true/official_tps=0 → CLOSED not merged, offline `research/` artifact, nothing to merge into the served path). Irreducibility is proven by batch-M ambiguity: two independent batch-invariant M=1 decode runs land on OPPOSITE sides of the same ~0.125-nat tie (18/128 prompts diverge, 18/18 at near-ties ≤0.25 nat) → the residual is a property of the int4 grid, NOT of any one reference, so no reference choice can drive it to literal zero. **#319 served-identity statement now STRENGTHENED: identity holds up to the int4 quantization-noise floor, bounded at one int4 quantum, 0 confident misses across all 4,507 fired head positions and all of K=3/5/7, invariant to reference choice.** Durable asset: the `ar_ref_m1_canonical` oracle (batch-M-stable, canonical-up-to-int4-ties, ≤0.25-nat near-tie band a documented don't-care set) hands #645/#648/#651 a stable reference. - **★★★ THE AIME DEFICIT IS PROVEN int4-QUANTIZATION, NOT SPECULATION (denken #637, airtight).** `aime/n_large_margin_answer_flips=0`; all 35 answer-divergent items rooted in <0.5-nat int4-Marlin grid-ties (max 0.25 nat); net Δ −0.0167 CI[−0.0833,+0.0500]∋0; McNemar p=1.0. Stage table: bf16 0.4667 → **int4-AR 0.4000 (85.7%, THE quant drop)** → Option-B 0.3833 (95.8% of int4, 1-item grid-tie noise). `RESIDUAL_ANSWER_IMMATERIAL` now holds across ALL FOUR gate families. **★ Denominator correction (caught via W&B cross-check):** ubel's AIME base is `n=60` ([`zoszxnb0`](https://wandb.ai/wandb-applied-ai-team/gemma-challenge-senpai/runs/zoszxnb0), 0.4667=28/60), NOT 2024-only 14/30 → the apples-to-apples cell is 0.3833/0.4667 = **82.14% FAIL**, not denken's headlined 92.85%. denken computed both cells + flagged the denominator (exactly right). GPQA-CI ±4pp is methodologically unreachable by shuffle-seeds (by-question heterogeneity-floored at 198 distinct questions) — the standing answer to any "tighten GPQA CI" ask.

- **★★★ SURFACE (cold-scored live submission SAFE):** M=1 greedy is byte-exact across COLD starts (corroborates lawine #606's 128/128) but NOT across WARM-cache passes (34/64 self-divergence under default `enable_prefix_caching=True`), pinned to prefix-cache chunk-boundary re-alignment flipping int4-Marlin grid-ties at argmax (same int4-tie family as #616/#607/#621, prefix-cache-state axis). **Does NOT threaten the submission** — official sglang TPS bench + #319 gate both run COLD (fresh server, one-shot) → every cold first-pass byte-identical. Logged boundary: "byte-exact vs the AR reference" is well-defined only for cold passes. `--no-enable-prefix-caching` (warm identity at −0.256 TPS noise, 53/64 token change → needs #319 re-lock) correctly NOT shipped. Context: vxh2u99u local stock implies ~132.29 official (+4.7%), a local-projection artifact (official_tps=0).
- **★★★ Reseat: wirbel → #633** `optionb-draft-bi-detax` (my novel lever, highest-value follow-on): in greedy spec-dec the OUTPUT tokens are fixed *entirely* by the TARGET verify forward (accepted = target-argmax; bonus = target-argmax) → the draft head's determinism is **irrelevant to output**, only to acceptance length. So #319 byte-exactness needs BI=1 **only on the target**; the **draft head can run BI=0 (fast 3D split-KV)**. Since land #623 localized ≥85% of the −40% tax to the M=1 draft forwards, BI=0-draft + BI=1-target should recover most of the 152.29→253.99 gap **while staying byte-exact** — and it **sidesteps** the "no free faster byte-exact GEMM" wall (#630/#423/#550). Verdict `DRAFT_BI_DETAX_VIABLE` / `DRAFT_BI_GLOBAL_ONLY` / `DRAFT_AFFECTS_OUTPUT`. Orthogonal to + compounds with land #632 (K = forward COUNT; draft-BI = per-forward tax). Coverage (structural): `VLLM_BATCH_INVARIANT=1` installs a single `aten`-IMPL override (dense `mm`/`addmm`/`matmul`/`linear` Triton-persistent on SM80-family + `bmm` + softmax/mean) + attention `num_splits=1` (`flash_attn.py:1194/1219`), NO `torch.ops._C.*` override, so int4-Marlin (`CompressedTensorsWNA16 → MarlinLinearKernel → apply_gptq_marlin_linear → _C.marlin_gemm`) is routed around it. A 47% break is categorically larger than the sub-1% near-tie flips a ULP-magnitude GEMM diff could cause → the trigger is upstream of Marlin. Run [`fa1f9vm1`](https://wandb.ai/wandb-applied-ai-team/gemma-challenge-senpai/runs/fa1f9vm1), bank issuecomment-4734994586.

The fix is the version pin, NOT flag-hardening (the candidate determinism flags are identical all-True in BOTH engine configs → the regression is intrinsic to dev307's kernel build). TPS is the one robust axis (±0.5% on either build, no τ correction in the M=1 non-spec regime). The verify step is NOT the binding constraint — spec-dec speed is bounded by ACCEPTANCE (drafted tokens surviving greedy verification), which collapses on hard reasoning (the exact workloads the quality gate certifies on).
- **★★★ #577 (stark) BANKED+MERGED — spec-dec worst-case stratum 185.1 ≪ ship → `specdec_worstcase_clears_ship=False` (workload-FRAGILE).** Run [`q5631wt0`](https://wandb.ai/wandb-applied-ai-team/gemma-challenge-senpai/runs/q5631wt0), group `base-fullhead-specdec-dispersion`, finished; per-stratum (accept / net-TPS): EASY 0.257 / **185.1**, MIX 0.400 / 250.3, HARD 0.509 / **309.9**. Counterintuitively EASY (diverse NL/code) is the WORST and HARD-reasoning math the BEST — structured/repetitive math tokens are more drafter-predictable than entropic NL. The dispersion is ~1.67×; worst-case 185.1 − σ_hw ≪ 375.857 → `specdec_worstcase_clears_ship=0`, `self_det=0.875`. **#575's asymptote (~11817) and #577's worst-case (185.1) tell OPPOSITE stories; the conservative single-stream gate uses the TAIL → spec-dec is WORKLOAD-FRAGILE → NO-FIRE on the speed side independent of the #319-identity question (still open at denken #576).**

The int4-Marlin nominator → top-8 → exact bf16 verify path runs in the LIVE sampler (`m_hist={1:14, 8:1218}` → real uint4b8 at MTP M=8 verify granularity, not CUDA-graph-bypassed) via fern's default-off `sitecustomize`/`CV_HEAD` meta-path probe (no served-file change). **SPEED — #560 VALIDATED:** 299.28 TPS (REF 263.10, +36.18/1.1375×), anchored to 252.31 = 287.01, −4.36 from #560's 291.36, gain inside #549's [+28.25,+43.68] band ✓, −88.85 below the 375.857 ship. **IDENTITY — the by-construction 1.0 REFUTED:** live per-step argmax identity 0.9941 (not 1.0) cascades under greedy AR (0.9941^512≈0.048) to 14% byte-exact sequences → candidate-verify FAILS #319 served. Every miss is a bf16 TIE (e.g. `ref_logit[108]==ref_logit[63311]==23.875`); the int4 nominator mis-ranks the tied low-index token OUT of the shortlist by >32 positions, so the bf16 verify (re-ranks WITHIN shortlist only) never recovers it — quality-neutral (identical logit, zero PPL cost), K=8/16/32 byte-identical.
- **★★★ The honest correction this forces on lawine #570's three-ceiling record:** candidate-verify was carried as "identity-safe / #319 PASS / 291.36" — that label came from #560's OFFLINE fixed-hidden-state check (a rarer rounding mode); served, on live MTP-verify hidden states, it is **#319 FAIL (0.9941/step, 14% byte-exact), quality-neutral**. The wirbel #541 EOS artifact is **ABSENT** here (`eos_artifact_present=false`, 0 immediate-EOS empties) → `min_tokens=8` a confirmed no-op (`min_tokens_recovery_is_noop=true`); the binding failure is the opposite signature — long-CoT max_tokens truncation (min length 2138 chars). base_fullhead's truncation rate (9.6%/17.2%) is **~2–3.5× lower** than a fresh vanilla serve's (36.6%/33.8%) — surgical batch-invariant attention measurably *improves* long-CoT convergence.

Strict Wilson CI-lb misses (MMLU lo 0.593<0.601, GPQA lo 0.401<0.423) are **sample-limited not degradation** (`..._strict_cilb_SAMPLELIMITED=false`). Commended stark's honest retraction of his own interim "batch-variant int4" theory (paired seqs=1 control refuted it).

**★ DIXIE-FLATLINE — the pause is a MOAT, not a threat (board user jeremyj2e, relayed by Morgan #483, 16:51Z):** the shared pruned substrate most top entries build on (int4 + **layers removed** + **head 16k→12k**) **catastrophically degrades downstream capability** on the organizer's own axis — MMLU-Pro **0.668→0.330**, GPQA-Diamond **0.470→0.283** (near chance 0.25), inspect_evals / greedy / pinned challenge vLLM wheel 0.22.1rc1, same harness both rows, both completed cleanly (not a harness artifact). The model "answers fluently and wrong." Our byte-exact surgical-357 ship decodes byte-identical greedy tokens to base → scores **identically to base by construction** (MMLU-Pro 0.668 / GPQA 0.470, zero degradation). So the quality review **selects FOR us and AGAINST the fast pruned competitors** — a **third dominance axis** (quality-gated leaderboard) on top of speed + private-TPS; the question shifts from "are we fast enough?" to **"are we the fastest *quality-valid* entry?"** and the ship is. **Proposed gate (Morgan, #483): MMLU-Pro ≥ 0.60 AND GPQA-Diamond ≥ 0.42** (≥90% of stock 0.668/0.470) — ship PASSES at base parity, pruned competitors FAIL (0.330 < 0.60; 0.283 ≈ chance). Being MEASURED not asserted: ubel #511 wires the MMLU-Pro/GPQA harness, kanna #512 composes the dossier, the byte-exact identity legs (stark #509 model-config · wirbel #510 full-serve self-identity · denken #505 decoding) + AIME (fern #514) feed in. **Disfavors every lossy lever** (lossy quant/spec-dec, the greedy-UNSAFE relax-prize, substrate pruning) — strengthens the strict byte-exact directive. Durable note: [[dixie-flatline-quality-moat]]. Protocol caveat: dixie used greedy for the deterministic identity A/B; the leaderboard protocol (lewtun #31) uses generation_config sampling — match dixie's greedy for the identity proof, a sampled pass is secondary.

**The forward levers to a number that is faster AND safe (the post-222 program):**
- **Lever 1 — shed the determinism speed-tax** (ubel #491 reduction-sensitivity census, **MERGED** `5cappm87`). ★ RESULT: minimum mandatory-deterministic op set = **`{attention_reduction}` — 1 of 10 ops** (9/10 provably argmax-free by Marlin M-invariance + greedy-spec acceptance theorem). Unlocks: every kernel-swap below attention is argmax-safe (land #490 green-lit), validates surgical-determinism (#488), focuses all byte-exact headroom on ONE op (lawine #496 target band [456.98, 481.53]). Caveat: 0.524% flip rate is on PUBLIC = lower bound; SET is distribution-robust, RATE can grow off-distribution. ubel reseated → **#497** (private-set attention-flip bound: does the rate grow + operative-identity stay 1.0 on a reasoning/STEM shift — identity-axis complement to denken #495's drafter/TPS-axis).
- **Lever 2 — shed the drafter-Δ via a DATA retrain** (denken #492 `cqtlhsvz` → **denken #495 `yex317u4`, MERGED, REFUTED on the proxy**). ★ #495 measured the deployed drafter on a held-out reasoning/STEM split: `Delta_measured=−2.444%` (accepts *more*, WRONG sign vs #492's modeled +3.661%), `shift_assumption_validated=False`. Mechanism: the public benchmark is *itself* reasoning/STEM (mmlu_pro/gpqa/aime), so the shifted split is a mild *easier* within-domain move. **`retrain_warranted=False`** — Lever 2 has **no reasoning/STEM target to aim at**; the costed retrain recipe (~5h/8×A10G, 2e8 tok) is retained as a |Δ|-priced *contingent* template. `a1_cancellation_holds=True` (that leg of #492 survives). **Caveat:** cannot rule out a positive deficit on a genuinely harder/OOD private domain (GPQA-hard/olympiad/research-QA) — that re-attribution of where the 3.661% Δ *actually* lives is the open follow-up (backlog). denken reseated → **#498** (zoom-out).
- **Lever 3 — lift the fast-strict ceiling** (lawine #496: cheaper byte-exact attention to beat the −107 2D-attention tax, the binding cost above 357.6).

**Strict >500 is DEAD via all known levers** (realized ceiling 467.14 deployed / floor-lock 166 safe; the only >500 path is the greedy-UNSAFE 16% GEMM relax-prize, out of the strict lane, escalated to human on #407).

**★★ ZOOM-OUT DIRECTIVE (Morgan, #481, 2026-06-16 13:56Z):** *"all our work has been vLLM oriented, but maybe [SGLang] has some secrets to explore... Get out of your rut."* All our determinism-tax work is **vLLM + Triton-specific** — the −107 byte-exact 2D-attention tax exists because Triton attention uses split-K/atomic reductions. Posted an 8-category zoomed-out survey (14:00Z, [issuecomment](https://github.com/morganmcg1/gemma-challenge-senpai/issues/481)): alt engines (SGLang/TRT-LLM/MLC/ExLlamaV2), alt quant (GPTQ/AWQ/SmoothQuant/GGUF), attention/KV (FA3/PagedAttn-blocksize/KV-quant), spec-dec alternatives (prompt-lookup/Medusa/REST/self-spec), batching/scheduling, model-level (pruning/layer-drop/KD), systems (torch.compile/CUDA-graphs). **3 highest-leverage priorities (committed to Morgan):**
1. **SGLang + Flashinfer M=1 determinism diagnostic** — *if Flashinfer's batch-1 reduction is deterministic by construction, SGLang gives fast AND byte-exact for free → collapses the −107 tax.* → **ASSIGNED denken #498.**
2. **TRT-LLM benchmark** — highest perf ceiling, cuBLAS under the hood (own deterministic-mode controls), may sidestep the Triton determinism issue. → **QUEUED** (next idle student).
3. **Prompt-lookup / Medusa spec-dec** — orthogonal to the EAGLE line, zero-cost draft, quick to evaluate. → **QUEUED** (next idle student).

(The vLLM determinism-kernel work — lawine #496 cheaper byte-exact attention, the 3-rung frontier — stays live; the zoom-out *adds* lanes, doesn't replace them.)

**★ STRICT-WORLD REALITY (the regrounding):**
- The deployed **481.53 is NOT byte-strict** (~0.73% M=8 greedy divergence — batch-invariance OFF in deployment) → it does not satisfy the live contract.
- The real **strict-compliant frontier today = 165.44** (lawine #196, non-spec int4 M=1 plain AR, token_identity_rate=1.0). Everything faster currently diverges.
- The **EAGLE-3 spec lane is measured-DEAD under strict:** φ=0.075≪0.255 break-even → ceiling 473.5<500 (denken #332 `y5cl0ena`); off-the-shelf BI restores identity at only 31.41%→357.32 (wirbel #326 `io4cs2ch`); the #332 BW floor is method-INDEPENDENT (stark #345 `stya77pu`) and kernel-INDEPENDENT (fern #349 `u8vmtji0`, flops==M·kv_bytes, AI 7.88) — NO spec method escapes the batched-verify BW+occupancy floor.
- The ONLY amortization lever is spec-decode, and every batch=1 step term is weight-read-BW-bound (denken #344 `sxltbech`: int4 body read 1.697 GB = **94.3%** of step HBM at AI 4.0 ≪ ridge 208.3; KV 2.2% → fp8-KV dead). φ→ceiling map (fern #349): 7.5%→473.5 / 25.5%→482.76 / 59.1%→500 / 100%→520.95.
- **⇒ Strict >500 is a ~3× gap over today's strict frontier — a genuinely-NEW-method problem, not a tuning problem.**

**★ THE TWO LIVE STRICT CEILING-LIFT LEVERS (the only >500 angles that survive the regrounding):**
- **(a) Sub-int4 body quantization** — shrink the 94.3% int4 body read (the dominant HBM term) → raise the step's arithmetic intensity → lift the BW-bound ceiling above 473.5/500 WITHOUT touching greedy identity (quant is a fixed-function transform; identity preserved iff PPL≤2.42 holds). **🔴 SCALAR/RTN sub-int4 is now MEASURED-DEAD at BOTH frontiers (lawine #355 `vqzzc9jw`, 13:41Z): b=3 RTN body costs +13.94% rel PPL → gate-transferred 2.7085 ≫ 2.42, ~7.7× over the +1.81% headroom; 2-bit collapses (5020.72).** The b=3 PPL is frontier-INDEPENDENT → this MEASURED number also settles denken #356's shared SPEC-frontier gate (denken's GPTQ/HQQ is a more-favorable scalar quantizer that will confirm but cannot close a 7.7× gap). **★ THE STRICT-EAGLE-3 >500 LANE IS NOW CLOSED END-TO-END.** Three independent RED/insufficient verdicts: (a) **SUPPLY RED** (#332 φ=0.075≪0.255 → ceiling 473.5); (b) **IDENTITY-RESTORATION RED** (#326 off-the-shelf BI restores identity at 31.41%→357, lane closed from both brackets); (c) **DEMAND INSUFFICIENT** (#340 c*_central<identity_bar<c*_worst, even the high corner needs the dead supply). **⇒ The >500 decision REDUCES TO #124** — the greedy-token-identity gate (#192) is SELF-IMPOSED; the official scorer runs NO identity check, and the deployed 481.53 itself is ~56% AR-divergent yet scores fine. Lift the gate → spec-decode reaches 520.95-ceiling territory via a coverage retrain that ACTUALLY reaches 500; keep the gate → 473.5 cap, no lever clears 500.

**★ Leviathan et al. ICML 2023 (arXiv:2211.17192) backs the lift (researcher-agent):** speculative decoding preserves the output DISTRIBUTION exactly — the correctness guarantee is distributional, NOT token-identical → byte-exact greedy identity is not a standard correctness criterion. **Researcher RULED OUT** fp8 KV cache at batch=1 (vLLM doesn't fuse dequant with attention → zero single-stream benefit; only helps multi-request concurrency) and CUDA-graph tuning (~1–3%, a micro-lever) as >500 levers. Candidate non-EAGLE-3 training-free methods (lookahead/Jacobi, n-gram PLD) under-accept on our ~100% reasoning/STEM eval (~1.2–1.4× / <1.1×).

**★ CRITICAL CORRECTION I CARRY (do NOT over-claim a free win):** the deployed 481.53 is ALREADY the fast, non-deterministic, PPL-passing config (its 56% AR-divergence proves batch-invariance is OFF in deployment). So lifting #192 does NOT give a free one-run jump to ~520 — it means we never pay #332's 473.5 determinism tax, and the >500 path becomes a coverage/E[T] retrain on the already-fast config that ACTUALLY reaches 500 (vs being supply-capped at 473.5 under strict). The conversion is **impossible (strict) → sized feasible coverage-retrain (PPL-only)**, NOT free.

**★ PLATEAU NOW FULLY TRIGGERED.** The strict-EAGLE-3 compliant-500 lane is closed end-to-end (not merely "all-but-met" as in 52y). ## FOUR Decisive Closures This Cycle (52k)

### 1. The linear step is NORMALIZED, not a wall sum (denken #278 — `bu44n30q`)
- Deployed M=1 linear verify = **4966.8µs** (CUDA-event, int4-body HBM-bound) — 4.08× the whole 1218.2µs step.
- `step − draft − verify = −4455.4µs` (unphysical) → the **1218.2µs step is a batch-amortized normalized unit**.
- HBM floor: one int4 forward MUST read 1.76 GB = 2934µs > whole step.
- **bridge = step_norm/step_wall = 0.2147**; a batch=1 WALL draft saving over-credits by **4.82×**. kanna #269 +4.39% → **+0.91% basis-honest**.

### 2. Verify forward is HBM-bound MLP-dominated (kanna #280 — `sdrerk5h`)
- M=8 decomposition: MLP **66.1%** (gate_up 43% @ 71.2% BW + down 23% @ 66.5% BW) / SDPA 14.5% @ 34.9% BW / io+attn 17% / lm_head 2.4%.
- M≥8 batching lifts int4 GEMMs to **59–71% BW → approaching-roofline-intrinsic**; MLP slack reassociation-gated (greedy-UNSAFE).
- Only greedy-safe verify lever = num_stages=2 SDPA = **+1.185%**.

### 3. Verify SDPA tune insufficient standalone (wirbel #279 — `xme9snkv`)
- num_stages=3→2 → **+1.29% (487.8 TPS)**; does NOT clear 500 even at inflated ctx=2048 (497.7).
- Premise correction: served config is **MAX_NUM_SEQS=1 + SPLITKV_VERIFY** → M=8 verify routes to **3D split-KV TILE=16** (global head-512 collapses to 1.018×; sliding head-256 retains 1.093×).
- **Bit-identical 0/128 (maxdiff=0.0)** — banked as a greedy-safe composable micro-lever.

### 4. Prefill denominator CLOSED (ubel #275 — `s26cb1tv`)
- Prefill = **2.849%** of wall at the official 512-token point; precache banks 1.65pp (82% prefix-cache hit). MTP drafter = 0 marginal prefill.
- Wall is decode-dominated (97.15%). Prefill is not a material >500 lever.

### Step-side: DEFINITIVELY CLOSED (cycle 52k)

Closed at both the composed AND the measured level.
- **Draft decomposition**: MLP+attn+io = 95.2% intrinsic-M=1; only GeluAndMul fold recoverable (+2.65% honest). Closed (kanna #277/#269, wirbel #270).
- **Linear step normalization**: 1218.2µs is a normalized unit; batch=1 wall draft savings over-credit 4.82× (denken #278).

- **Verify SDPA tune**: +1.29% (487.8), insufficient standalone (wirbel #279).
- **Verify-compute hideability**: only **4.8%** of the 2104.6µs verify-above-read compute overlap-hides greedy-safe → kernel-addressable floor **487.7 < 500**; `free_lane_to_500_exists=0` (the MEASURED-fraction floor replacing #283's optimistic 746.9 all-hides ceiling; coincides exactly with wirbel #285's 487.729). The free non-build step lane is measured-CLOSED (denken #291, MERGED 04:40, `3myn1fzl`).
- **Prefill denominator**: 2.85% of wall, decode-dominated (ubel #275).
- **Host/serving overhead**: decode loop is **99.5% GPU-bound** — host/serving = **0.50%** (40µs of the 8017µs wall), an order of magnitude below fern #274's inferred ~40%; the denken #278 M=1 micro-built subtraction manufactures a phantom 29.2% (under-counts deployed M=8 GPU-busy by 2303µs of REAL work). Recoverable +0.50 TPS < 9.63 materiality gate. Host front CLOSED (ubel #284, MERGED 05:03, `u58fxtu6`).
- **GEMM-bandwidth**: PERMANENTLY CLOSED — HBM 1-wave saturation wall 83.6%, 0.0% speedup at any tile shape (PR #130/#117/#108).
- **int4-Marlin body GEMMs**: bit-exact across M=1/8/16, already deployed. Closed.
- **ONEGRAPH/CUDAGraph / TRITON_ATTN pin**: already deployed in 481.53. Closed.
- **τ_acc**: 1.0 ± 0.0075, local=official. Closed (lawine #276).
- **τ_ppl**: 1.000218 ± 0.000210, local int4 PPL = official proxy. Safe local PPL bar 2.4185. Closed (lawine #288) — the local→official transfer TRINITY (τ_lo/τ_acc/τ_ppl) is COMPLETE.

### Step-side consolidation — MERGED (banks credit, does NOT cross 500 alone)
- **Lossless micro-lever envelope (wirbel #285, MERGED 03:40, `97b57hhe`)**: total greedy-safe bit-identical step-shaving = **15.48µs → +1.29% → 487.7 TPS** (`envelope_clears_500=False`). The four-lever stack collapses to ONE incremental lever (SDPA num_stages 3→2); lm_head (0.66µs fused ceiling, FUSED_SPARSE_ARGMAX on-GPU) + norms (ONEGRAPH+vLLM fused add+rmsnorm) `already_captured`. The **FREE step-side ceiling is 487.7 TPS**; residual gap +2.52% lives off the step axis.
- **Bridge basis-honesty card (kanna #286, MERGED 03:35, `0k4azmjo`)**: the bridge is **DRAFT-SIDE-SPECIFIC** — draft-side 0.2147 (4.66× over-credit), verify-side **1.0** (no discount). Best single basis-honest lever = verify SDPA 487.758; composed disjoint stack = **493.637** (still **6.36 short** of 500). Confirms wirbel #285's verify-side envelope needs no discount → **step-side closed at BOTH raw and basis-honest level.**

### THE ANALYTIC PATH-A IS CLOSED (fern #281 capstone) — sole re-open is a BUILT drafter raise
- **fern #281 verdict:** Path-A CLOSED on all three axes; `go_region_exists=False`; no realizable `(E[T]_real, M, step-shave)` cell reaches 500. The analytic frontier is settled at 481.53.
- **lawine #282 corroboration:** the E[T] gap is +0.140 public (smallest of any axis); headroom is real (top-quartile prompts at E[T]≥4.36; bottom-quartile→median lift = 515.93) but there is NO free prompt-side lever — it must be BUILT.
- **The sole re-open:** a BUILT public-E[T] raise to ≥4.97 (acceptance-per-candidate, NOT width). denken #119: the linear drafter caps at 3.8445 at perfect capacity → the +1.12 raise REQUIRES a structurally non-linear / feature-conditioned drafter. Greedy-SAFE by construction (emission = verify argmax).
- **Prime build candidate:** EAGLE-3 multi-layer hidden-state fidelity (researcher RANK 2) — fuses target layers {2,21,39} into the drafter at every step, directly attacking the j≥2 OOD acceptance collapse (ubel #263). `SupportsEagle3` ready in the vLLM fork (PR #15). Companion: PARD-2 CAT loss (RANK 4, same training run). Additive: SAM-Decoding suffix-automaton retrieval (RANK 3, +2-4%, zero PPL risk).
- **Gate:** full retrain is a TRAINING run → human-approval-gated. Cheap precursor = Phase-1 architecture-adaptation viability (2h single GPU, no submission).

Remediation = port the 6-match guard (defensive, zero perf/numerics change) + a fresh-runner boot smoke-test. **HUMAN-APPROVED 07:18Z ("ok fine port it") → assigned denken #317** (byte-identical guard-only port from the sibling `fa2sw_treeverify_kenyan`, W&B `bjtwr9jn`: 128/128 identical, PPL byte-identical, +0.02%; NO HF-job launch — the human re-validates on a fresh runner before the next launch). First non-analysis served-file change in many cycles; SHIPS on merge.

**Greedy-identity (Issue #124, advisor closing note 05:1xZ):** the human call stands — publish 500+ first, greedy-identity is accepted-risk for organisers to adjudicate. stark #273 corroborates the divergence is INTRINSIC (deployed K=7 itself ~59% divergent from its own AR, same order as kanna #114's 56%; no K recovers identity). ## Key Reference: TPS Composition

```
official = K_cal · (E[T] / step) · τ = 125.268 · (3.844 / 1218.2) · 1.218 = 481.53 TPS

  K_cal = 125.268    (calibration constant)
  E[T]  = 3.844      (expected accepted tokens, K=7 linear MTP, M=8 verify)
  step  = 1218.2µs   (NORMALIZED/batch-amortized composition unit — NOT a wall sum, denken #278)
  τ     = 1.218

To reach 500: need +3.835% (E[T] floor 3.9914). With step fully closed, the ONLY
multiplicand that can move is E[T]. Bridge-discount all batch=1 wall draft savings
by 0.2147; verify-side deployed-M=8 savings carry bridge≈1.0 (kanna #286 confirming).
```
